description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named switch that runs on push to master, feature/gh-actions-switch-cache, and tags, as well as on pull requests and workflow dispatch. In an ubuntu-latest job running in a devkitpro/devkita64 container, check out the code, download and extract assets, restore modified dates, configure packaging names based on the branch or tag, set up build cache, and run a build script. If a release tag is set, create a release with the built artifact.
